name: @bubblelab/bubble-appgen
description: Contract-first bubble generator: OpenAPI spec in, type-enforced ServiceBubble out (ADD-ANY-APP stages S1-S6)

scripts.generate:bigquery: bun scripts/discovery-to-openapi.ts && bun src/cli.ts --spec fixtures/bigquery-v2.openapi.json --config examples/bigquery.config.json
scripts.generate:redshift-data: bun scripts/smithy-to-openapi.ts && bun src/cli.ts --spec fixtures/redshift-data.openapi.json --config examples/redshift-data.config.json
